The '''Pixelito Grand Council''' was a group of government leaders in the city of [[Pixelito/Legends|Pixelito]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. It is known that they often dealt with the posting of bounties on the planet's treacherous criminals.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{Mo}}
